word: H4376 - מָכַר - mâkar - maw-kar' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכר

Transliteration: mâkar

Phonetic: maw-kar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sell
    1. (Qal)
      1. to sell
      2. seller (participle)
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be sold
      2. to sell oneself
      3. to be given over to death
    3. (Hithpael) to sell oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1194

Part(s) of speech: Verb
